summary: Very good audience recording of a rare show, praised for its clarity despite limited performance commentary.
review: Both reviewers highlight that this crowd‑sourced audience tape sounds very good and fills a gap left by previous poor recordings of the second set. No specific musical details are given, but the positive ratings indicate overall satisfaction with what’s available.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are strongly positive about the audio quality; however, no information on the musical performance limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crowd source praised as clear and very good sounding; no noted drop‑outs or major flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on the performance; reviewers focus solely on the availability and sound of the audience recording.
